headline: Bonds are Taking a Hit. A Steadier Place to Diversify Further
summary: Bond funds have taken some small backward steps in recent weeks, thanks in part to the rising risk of Fed rate hikes instead of rate cuts. Undoubtedly, the war in Iran isn’t over yet, and there’s concern that things could escalate further, with oil prices rising above $110 per barrel, a level that would have ... Bonds are Taking a Hit. A Steadier Place to Diversify Further

headline: OPEC+ mulls "paper" output hike as Iran war paralyzes 15% of global oil supply
summary: Investing.com -- OPEC+ is expected to approve a theoretical increase in oil production during its Sunday virtual meeting, according to group sources, though analysts warn the move will exist almost entirely "on paper," says Reuters.
